<span class="hl lin" id="l_26202">26202 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26203">26203 </span>    rclone sync -i /home/local/directory remote:directory
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26204">26204 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26205">26205 </span>SSH Authentication
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26206">26206 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26207">26207 </span>The SFTP remote supports three authentication methods:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26208">26208 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26209">26209 </span>-   Password
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26210">26210 </span>-   Key file, including certificate signed keys
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26211">26211 </span>-   ssh-agent
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26212">26212 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26213">26213 </span>Key files should be PEM-encoded private key files. For instance
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26214">26214 </span>/home/$USER/.ssh/id_rsa. Only unencrypted OpenSSH or PEM encrypted files
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26215">26215 </span>are supported.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26216">26216 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26217">26217 </span>The key file can be specified in either an external file (key_file) or
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26218">26218 </span>contained within the rclone config file (key_pem). If using key_pem in
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26219">26219 </span>the config file, the entry should be on a single line with new line (&#39;&#39;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26220">26220 </span>or &#39;&#39;) separating lines. i.e.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26221">26221 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26222">26222 </span>key_pem = -----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----0gAMbMbaSsd-----END RSA PRIVATE
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26223">26223 </span>KEY-----
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26224">26224 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26225">26225 </span>This will generate it correctly for key_pem for use in the config:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26226">26226 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26227">26227 </span>    awk &#39;{printf &quot;%s\\n&quot;, $0}&#39; &lt; ~/.ssh/id_rsa
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26228">26228 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26229">26229 </span>If you don&#39;t specify pass, key_file, or key_pem then rclone will attempt
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26230">26230 </span>to contact an ssh-agent.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26231">26231 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26232">26232 </span>You can also specify key_use_agent to force the usage of an ssh-agent.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26233">26233 </span>In this case key_file or key_pem can also be specified to force the
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26234">26234 </span>usage of a specific key in the ssh-agent.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26235">26235 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26236">26236 </span>Using an ssh-agent is the only way to load encrypted OpenSSH keys at the
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26237">26237 </span>moment.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26238">26238 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26239">26239 </span>If you set the --sftp-ask-password option, rclone will prompt for a
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26240">26240 </span>password when needed and no password has been configured.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26241">26241 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26242">26242 </span>If you have a certificate then you can provide the path to the public
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26243">26243 </span>key that contains the certificate. For example:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26244">26244 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26245">26245 </span>    [remote]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26246">26246 </span>    type = sftp
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26247">26247 </span>    host = example.com
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26248">26248 </span>    user = sftpuser
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26249">26249 </span>    key_file = ~/id_rsa
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26250">26250 </span>    pubkey_file = ~/id_rsa-cert.pub
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26251">26251 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26252">26252 </span>If you concatenate a cert with a private key then you can specify the
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26253">26253 </span>merged file in both places.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26254">26254 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26255">26255 </span>Note: the cert must come first in the file. e.g.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26256">26256 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26257">26257 </span>    cat id_rsa-cert.pub id_rsa &gt; merged_key
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26258">26258 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26259">26259 </span>Host key validation
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26260">26260 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26261">26261 </span>By default rclone will not check the server&#39;s host key for validation.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26262">26262 </span>This can allow an attacker to replace a server with their own and if you
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26263">26263 </span>use password authentication then this can lead to that password being
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26264">26264 </span>exposed.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26265">26265 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26266">26266 </span>Host key matching, using standard known_hosts files can be turned on by
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26267">26267 </span>enabling the known_hosts_file option. This can point to the file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26268">26268 </span>maintained by OpenSSH or can point to a unique file.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26269">26269 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26270">26270 </span>e.g.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26271">26271 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26272">26272 </span>    [remote]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26273">26273 </span>    type = sftp
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26274">26274 </span>    host = example.com
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26275">26275 </span>    user = sftpuser
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26276">26276 </span>    pass = 
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26277">26277 </span>    known_hosts_file = ~/.ssh/known_hosts
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26278">26278 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26279">26279 </span>There are some limitations:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26280">26280 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26281">26281 </span>-   rclone will not _manage_ this file for you. If the key is missing or
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26282">26282 </span>    wrong then the connection will be refused.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26283">26283 </span>-   If the server is set up for a certificate host key then the entry in
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26284">26284 </span>    the known_hosts file _must_ be the &#64;cert-authority entry for the CA
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26285">26285 </span>-   Unlike OpenSSH, the libraries used by rclone do not permit (at time
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26286">26286 </span>    of writing) multiple host keys to be listed for a server. Only the
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26287">26287 </span>    first entry is used.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26288">26288 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26289">26289 </span>If the host key provided by the server does not match the one in the
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26290">26290 </span>file (or is missing) then the connection will be aborted and an error
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26291">26291 </span>returned such as
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26292">26292 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26293">26293 </span>    NewFs: couldn&#39;t connect SSH: ssh: handshake failed: knownhosts: key mismatch
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26294">26294 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26295">26295 </span>or
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26296">26296 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26297">26297 </span>    NewFs: couldn&#39;t connect SSH: ssh: handshake failed: knownhosts: key is unknown
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26298">26298 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26299">26299 </span>If you see an error such as
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26300">26300 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26301">26301 </span>    NewFs: couldn&#39;t connect SSH: ssh: handshake failed: ssh: no authorities for hostname: example.com:22
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26302">26302 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26303">26303 </span>then it is likely the server has presented a CA signed host certificate
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26304">26304 </span>and you will need to add the appropriate &#64;cert-authority entry.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26305">26305 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26306">26306 </span>The known_hosts_file setting can be set during rclone config as an
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26307">26307 </span>advanced option.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26308">26308 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26309">26309 </span>ssh-agent on macOS
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26310">26310 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26311">26311 </span>Note that there seem to be various problems with using an ssh-agent on
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26312">26312 </span>macOS due to recent changes in the OS. The most effective work-around
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26313">26313 </span>seems to be to start an ssh-agent in each session, e.g.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26314">26314 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26315">26315 </span>    eval `ssh-agent -s` &amp;&amp; ssh-add -A
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26316">26316 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26317">26317 </span>And then at the end of the session
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26318">26318 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26319">26319 </span>    eval `ssh-agent -k`
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26320">26320 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26321">26321 </span>These commands can be used in scripts of course.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26322">26322 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26323">26323 </span>Modified time
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26324">26324 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26325">26325 </span>Modified times are stored on the server to 1 second precision.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26326">26326 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26327">26327 </span>Modified times are used in syncing and are fully supported.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26328">26328 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26329">26329 </span>Some SFTP servers disable setting/modifying the file modification time
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26330">26330 </span>after upload (for example, certain configurations of ProFTPd with
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26331">26331 </span>mod_sftp). If you are using one of these servers, you can set the option
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26332">26332 </span>set_modtime = false in your RClone backend configuration to disable this
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26333">26333 </span>behaviour.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26334">26334 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26335">26335 </span>Standard Options
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26336">26336 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26337">26337 </span>Here are the standard options specific to sftp (SSH/SFTP Connection).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26338">26338 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26339">26339 </span>--sftp-host
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26340">26340 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26341">26341 </span>SSH host to connect to
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26342">26342 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26343">26343 </span>-   Config: host
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26344">26344 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_HOST
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26345">26345 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26346">26346 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26347">26347 </span>-   Examples:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26348">26348 </span>    -   &quot;example.com&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26349">26349 </span>        -   Connect to example.com
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26350">26350 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26351">26351 </span>--sftp-user
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26352">26352 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26353">26353 </span>SSH username, leave blank for current username, $USER
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26354">26354 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26355">26355 </span>-   Config: user
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26356">26356 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_USER
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26357">26357 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26358">26358 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26359">26359 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26360">26360 </span>--sftp-port
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26361">26361 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26362">26362 </span>SSH port, leave blank to use default (22)
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26363">26363 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26364">26364 </span>-   Config: port
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26365">26365 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_PORT
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26366">26366 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26367">26367 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26368">26368 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26369">26369 </span>--sftp-pass
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26370">26370 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26371">26371 </span>SSH password, leave blank to use ssh-agent.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26372">26372 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26373">26373 </span>NB Input to this must be obscured - see rclone obscure.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26374">26374 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26375">26375 </span>-   Config: pass
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26376">26376 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_PASS
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26377">26377 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26378">26378 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26379">26379 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26380">26380 </span>--sftp-key-pem
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26381">26381 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26382">26382 </span>Raw PEM-encoded private key, If specified, will override key_file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26383">26383 </span>parameter.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26384">26384 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26385">26385 </span>-   Config: key_pem
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26386">26386 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_KEY_PEM
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26387">26387 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26388">26388 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26389">26389 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26390">26390 </span>--sftp-key-file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26391">26391 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26392">26392 </span>Path to PEM-encoded private key file, leave blank or set key-use-agent
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26393">26393 </span>to use ssh-agent.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26394">26394 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26395">26395 </span>Leading ~ will be expanded in the file name as will environment
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26396">26396 </span>variables such as ${RCLONE_CONFIG_DIR}.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26397">26397 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26398">26398 </span>-   Config: key_file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26399">26399 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_KEY_FILE
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26400">26400 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26401">26401 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26402">26402 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26403">26403 </span>--sftp-key-file-pass
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26404">26404 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26405">26405 </span>The passphrase to decrypt the PEM-encoded private key file.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26406">26406 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26407">26407 </span>Only PEM encrypted key files (old OpenSSH format) are supported.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26408">26408 </span>Encrypted keys in the new OpenSSH format can&#39;t be used.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26409">26409 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26410">26410 </span>NB Input to this must be obscured - see rclone obscure.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26411">26411 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26412">26412 </span>-   Config: key_file_pass
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26413">26413 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_KEY_FILE_PASS
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26414">26414 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26415">26415 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26416">26416 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26417">26417 </span>--sftp-pubkey-file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26418">26418 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26419">26419 </span>Optional path to public key file.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26420">26420 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26421">26421 </span>Set this if you have a signed certificate you want to use for
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26422">26422 </span>authentication.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26423">26423 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26424">26424 </span>Leading ~ will be expanded in the file name as will environment
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26425">26425 </span>variables such as ${RCLONE_CONFIG_DIR}.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26426">26426 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26427">26427 </span>-   Config: pubkey_file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26428">26428 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_PUBKEY_FILE
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26429">26429 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26430">26430 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26431">26431 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26432">26432 </span>--sftp-key-use-agent
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26433">26433 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26434">26434 </span>When set forces the usage of the ssh-agent.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26435">26435 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26436">26436 </span>When key-file is also set, the &quot;.pub&quot; file of the specified key-file is
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26437">26437 </span>read and only the associated key is requested from the ssh-agent. This
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26438">26438 </span>allows to avoid Too many authentication failures for *username* errors
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26439">26439 </span>when the ssh-agent contains many keys.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26440">26440 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26441">26441 </span>-   Config: key_use_agent
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26442">26442 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_KEY_USE_AGENT
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26443">26443 </span>-   Type: bool
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26444">26444 </span>-   Default: false
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26445">26445 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26446">26446 </span>--sftp-use-insecure-cipher
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26447">26447 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26448">26448 </span>Enable the use of insecure ciphers and key exchange methods.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26449">26449 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26450">26450 </span>This enables the use of the following insecure ciphers and key exchange
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26451">26451 </span>methods:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26452">26452 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26453">26453 </span>-   aes128-cbc
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26454">26454 </span>-   aes192-cbc
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26455">26455 </span>-   aes256-cbc
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26456">26456 </span>-   3des-cbc
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26457">26457 </span>-   diffie-hellman-group-exchange-sha256
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26458">26458 </span>-   diffie-hellman-group-exchange-sha1
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26459">26459 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26460">26460 </span>Those algorithms are insecure and may allow plaintext data to be
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26461">26461 </span>recovered by an attacker.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26462">26462 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26463">26463 </span>-   Config: use_insecure_cipher
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26464">26464 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_USE_INSECURE_CIPHER
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26465">26465 </span>-   Type: bool
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26466">26466 </span>-   Default: false
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26467">26467 </span>-   Examples:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26468">26468 </span>    -   &quot;false&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26469">26469 </span>        -   Use default Cipher list.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26470">26470 </span>    -   &quot;true&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26471">26471 </span>        -   Enables the use of the aes128-cbc cipher and
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26472">26472 </span>            diffie-hellman-group-exchange-sha256,
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26473">26473 </span>            diffie-hellman-group-exchange-sha1 key exchange.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26474">26474 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26475">26475 </span>--sftp-disable-hashcheck
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26476">26476 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26477">26477 </span>Disable the execution of SSH commands to determine if remote file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26478">26478 </span>hashing is available. Leave blank or set to false to enable hashing
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26479">26479 </span>(recommended), set to true to disable hashing.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26480">26480 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26481">26481 </span>-   Config: disable_hashcheck
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26482">26482 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_DISABLE_HASHCHECK
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26483">26483 </span>-   Type: bool
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26484">26484 </span>-   Default: false
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26485">26485 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26486">26486 </span>Advanced Options
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26487">26487 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26488">26488 </span>Here are the advanced options specific to sftp (SSH/SFTP Connection).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26489">26489 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26490">26490 </span>--sftp-known-hosts-file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26491">26491 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26492">26492 </span>Optional path to known_hosts file.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26493">26493 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26494">26494 </span>Set this value to enable server host key validation.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26495">26495 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26496">26496 </span>Leading ~ will be expanded in the file name as will environment
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26497">26497 </span>variables such as ${RCLONE_CONFIG_DIR}.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26498">26498 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26499">26499 </span>-   Config: known_hosts_file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26500">26500 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_KNOWN_HOSTS_FILE
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26501">26501 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26502">26502 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26503">26503 </span>-   Examples:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26504">26504 </span>    -   &quot;~/.ssh/known_hosts&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26505">26505 </span>        -   Use OpenSSH&#39;s known_hosts file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26506">26506 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26507">26507 </span>--sftp-ask-password
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26508">26508 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26509">26509 </span>Allow asking for SFTP password when needed.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26510">26510 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26511">26511 </span>If this is set and no password is supplied then rclone will: - ask for a
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26512">26512 </span>password - not contact the ssh agent
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26513">26513 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26514">26514 </span>-   Config: ask_password
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26515">26515 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_ASK_PASSWORD
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26516">26516 </span>-   Type: bool
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26517">26517 </span>-   Default: false
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26518">26518 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26519">26519 </span>--sftp-path-override
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26520">26520 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26521">26521 </span>Override path used by SSH connection.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26522">26522 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26523">26523 </span>This allows checksum calculation when SFTP and SSH paths are different.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26524">26524 </span>This issue affects among others Synology NAS boxes.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26525">26525 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26526">26526 </span>Shared folders can be found in directories representing volumes
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26527">26527 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26528">26528 </span>    rclone sync /home/local/directory remote:/directory --ssh-path-override /volume2/directory
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26529">26529 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26530">26530 </span>Home directory can be found in a shared folder called &quot;home&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26531">26531 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26532">26532 </span>    rclone sync /home/local/directory remote:/home/directory --ssh-path-override /volume1/homes/USER/directory
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26533">26533 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26534">26534 </span>-   Config: path_override
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26535">26535 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_PATH_OVERRIDE
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26536">26536 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26537">26537 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26538">26538 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26539">26539 </span>--sftp-set-modtime
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26540">26540 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26541">26541 </span>Set the modified time on the remote if set.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26542">26542 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26543">26543 </span>-   Config: set_modtime
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26544">26544 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_SET_MODTIME
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26545">26545 </span>-   Type: bool
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26546">26546 </span>-   Default: true
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26547">26547 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26548">26548 </span>--sftp-md5sum-command
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26549">26549 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26550">26550 </span>The command used to read md5 hashes. Leave blank for autodetect.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26551">26551 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26552">26552 </span>-   Config: md5sum_command
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26553">26553 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_MD5SUM_COMMAND
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26554">26554 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26555">26555 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26556">26556 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26557">26557 </span>--sftp-sha1sum-command
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26558">26558 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26559">26559 </span>The command used to read sha1 hashes. Leave blank for autodetect.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26560">26560 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26561">26561 </span>-   Config: sha1sum_command
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26562">26562 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_SHA1SUM_COMMAND
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26563">26563 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26564">26564 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26565">26565 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26566">26566 </span>--sftp-skip-links
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26567">26567 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26568">26568 </span>Set to skip any symlinks and any other non regular files.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26569">26569 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26570">26570 </span>-   Config: skip_links
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26571">26571 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_SKIP_LINKS
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26572">26572 </span>-   Type: bool
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26573">26573 </span>-   Default: false
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26574">26574 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26575">26575 </span>--sftp-subsystem
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26576">26576 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26577">26577 </span>Specifies the SSH2 subsystem on the remote host.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26578">26578 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26579">26579 </span>-   Config: subsystem
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26580">26580 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_SUBSYSTEM
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26581">26581 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26582">26582 </span>-   Default: &quot;sftp&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26583">26583 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26584">26584 </span>--sftp-server-command
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26585">26585 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26586">26586 </span>Specifies the path or command to run a sftp server on the remote host.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26587">26587 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26588">26588 </span>The subsystem option is ignored when server_command is defined.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26589">26589 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26590">26590 </span>-   Config: server_command
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26591">26591 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_SERVER_COMMAND
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26592">26592 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26593">26593 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26594">26594 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26595">26595 </span>--sftp-use-fstat
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26596">26596 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26597">26597 </span>If set use fstat instead of stat
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26598">26598 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26599">26599 </span>Some servers limit the amount of open files and calling Stat after
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26600">26600 </span>opening the file will throw an error from the server. Setting this flag
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26601">26601 </span>will call Fstat instead of Stat which is called on an already open file
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26602">26602 </span>handle.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26603">26603 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26604">26604 </span>It has been found that this helps with IBM Sterling SFTP servers which
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26605">26605 </span>have &quot;extractability&quot; level set to 1 which means only 1 file can be
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26606">26606 </span>opened at any given time.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26607">26607 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26608">26608 </span>-   Config: use_fstat
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26609">26609 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_USE_FSTAT
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26610">26610 </span>-   Type: bool
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26611">26611 </span>-   Default: false
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26612">26612 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26613">26613 </span>--sftp-disable-concurrent-reads
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26614">26614 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26615">26615 </span>If set don&#39;t use concurrent reads
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26616">26616 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26617">26617 </span>Normally concurrent reads are safe to use and not using them will
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26618">26618 </span>degrade performance, so this option is disabled by default.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26619">26619 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26620">26620 </span>Some servers limit the amount number of times a file can be downloaded.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26621">26621 </span>Using concurrent reads can trigger this limit, so if you have a server
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26622">26622 </span>which returns
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26623">26623 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26624">26624 </span>    Failed to copy: file does not exist
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26625">26625 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26626">26626 </span>Then you may need to enable this flag.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26627">26627 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26628">26628 </span>If concurrent reads are disabled, the use_fstat option is ignored.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26629">26629 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26630">26630 </span>-   Config: disable_concurrent_reads
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26631">26631 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_DISABLE_CONCURRENT_READS
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26632">26632 </span>-   Type: bool
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26633">26633 </span>-   Default: false
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26634">26634 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26635">26635 </span>--sftp-idle-timeout
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26636">26636 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26637">26637 </span>Max time before closing idle connections
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26638">26638 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26639">26639 </span>If no connections have been returned to the connection pool in the time
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26640">26640 </span>given, rclone will empty the connection pool.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26641">26641 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26642">26642 </span>Set to 0 to keep connections indefinitely.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26643">26643 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26644">26644 </span>-   Config: idle_timeout
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26645">26645 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SFTP_IDLE_TIMEOUT
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26646">26646 </span>-   Type: Duration
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26647">26647 </span>-   Default: 1m0s
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26648">26648 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26649">26649 </span>Limitations
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26650">26650 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26651">26651 </span>SFTP supports checksums if the same login has shell access and md5sum or
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26652">26652 </span>sha1sum as well as echo are in the remote&#39;s PATH. This remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26653">26653 </span>checksumming (file hashing) is recommended and enabled by default.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26654">26654 </span>Disabling the checksumming may be required if you are connecting to SFTP
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26655">26655 </span>servers which are not under your control, and to which the execution of
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26656">26656 </span>remote commands is prohibited. Set the configuration option
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26657">26657 </span>disable_hashcheck to true to disable checksumming.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26658">26658 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26659">26659 </span>SFTP also supports about if the same login has shell access and df are
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26660">26660 </span>in the remote&#39;s PATH. about will return the total space, free space, and
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26661">26661 </span>used space on the remote for the disk of the specified path on the
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26662">26662 </span>remote or, if not set, the disk of the root on the remote. about will
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26663">26663 </span>fail if it does not have shell access or if df is not in the remote&#39;s
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26664">26664 </span>PATH.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26665">26665 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26666">26666 </span>Note that some SFTP servers (e.g. Synology) the paths are different for
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26667">26667 </span>SSH and SFTP so the hashes can&#39;t be calculated properly. For them using
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26668">26668 </span>disable_hashcheck is a good idea.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26669">26669 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26670">26670 </span>The only ssh agent supported under Windows is Putty&#39;s pageant.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26671">26671 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26672">26672 </span>The Go SSH library disables the use of the aes128-cbc cipher by default,
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26673">26673 </span>due to security concerns. This can be re-enabled on a per-connection
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26674">26674 </span>basis by setting the use_insecure_cipher setting in the configuration
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26675">26675 </span>file to true. Further details on the insecurity of this cipher can be
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26676">26676 </span>found in this paper.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26677">26677 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26678">26678 </span>SFTP isn&#39;t supported under plan9 until this issue is fixed.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26679">26679 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26680">26680 </span>Note that since SFTP isn&#39;t HTTP based the following flags don&#39;t work
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26681">26681 </span>with it: --dump-headers, --dump-bodies, --dump-auth
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26682">26682 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26683">26683 </span>Note that --timeout isn&#39;t supported (but --contimeout is).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26684">26684 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26685">26685 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26686">26686 </span>C14
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26687">26687 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26688">26688 </span>C14 is supported through the SFTP backend.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26689">26689 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26690">26690 </span>See C14&#39;s documentation
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26691">26691 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26692">26692 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26693">26693 </span>rsync.net
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26694">26694 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26695">26695 </span>rsync.net is supported through the SFTP backend.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26696">26696 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26697">26697 </span>See rsync.net&#39;s documentation of rclone examples.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26698">26698 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26699">26699 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26700">26700 </span>SugarSync
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26701">26701 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26702">26702 </span>SugarSync is a cloud service that enables active synchronization of
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26703">26703 </span>files across computers and other devices for file backup, access,
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26704">26704 </span>syncing, and sharing.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26705">26705 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26706">26706 </span>The initial setup for SugarSync involves getting a token from SugarSync
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26707">26707 </span>which you can do with rclone. rclone config walks you through it.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26708">26708 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26709">26709 </span>Here is an example of how to make a remote called remote. First run:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26710">26710 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26711">26711 </span>     rclone config
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26712">26712 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26713">26713 </span>This will guide you through an interactive setup process:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26714">26714 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26715">26715 </span>    No remotes found - make a new one
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26716">26716 </span>    n) New remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26717">26717 </span>    s) Set configuration password
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26718">26718 </span>    q) Quit config
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26719">26719 </span>    n/s/q&gt; n
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26720">26720 </span>    name&gt; remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26721">26721 </span>    Type of storage to configure.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26722">26722 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26723">26723 </span>    Choose a number from below, or type in your own value
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26724">26724 </span>    [snip]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26725">26725 </span>    XX / Sugarsync
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26726">26726 </span>       \ &quot;sugarsync&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26727">26727 </span>    [snip]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26728">26728 </span>    Storage&gt; sugarsync
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26729">26729 </span>    ** See help for sugarsync backend at: https://rclone.org/sugarsync/ **
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26730">26730 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26731">26731 </span>    Sugarsync App ID.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26732">26732 </span>    Leave blank to use rclone&#39;s.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26733">26733 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26734">26734 </span>    app_id&gt; 
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26735">26735 </span>    Sugarsync Access Key ID.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26736">26736 </span>    Leave blank to use rclone&#39;s.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26737">26737 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26738">26738 </span>    access_key_id&gt; 
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26739">26739 </span>    Sugarsync Private Access Key
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26740">26740 </span>    Leave blank to use rclone&#39;s.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26741">26741 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26742">26742 </span>    private_access_key&gt; 
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26743">26743 </span>    Permanently delete files if true
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26744">26744 </span>    otherwise put them in the deleted files.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26745">26745 </span>    Enter a boolean value (true or false). Press Enter for the default (&quot;false&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26746">26746 </span>    hard_delete&gt; 
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26747">26747 </span>    Edit advanced config? (y/n)
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26748">26748 </span>    y) Yes
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26749">26749 </span>    n) No (default)
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26750">26750 </span>    y/n&gt; n
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26751">26751 </span>    Remote config
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26752">26752 </span>    Username (email address)&gt; nick&#64;craig-wood.com
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26753">26753 </span>    Your Sugarsync password is only required during setup and will not be stored.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26754">26754 </span>    password:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26755">26755 </span>    --------------------
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26756">26756 </span>    [remote]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26757">26757 </span>    type = sugarsync
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26758">26758 </span>    refresh_token = https://api.sugarsync.com/app-authorization/XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26759">26759 </span>    --------------------
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26760">26760 </span>    y) Yes this is OK (default)
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26761">26761 </span>    e) Edit this remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26762">26762 </span>    d) Delete this remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26763">26763 </span>    y/e/d&gt; y
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26764">26764 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26765">26765 </span>Note that the config asks for your email and password but doesn&#39;t store
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26766">26766 </span>them, it only uses them to get the initial token.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26767">26767 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26768">26768 </span>Once configured you can then use rclone like this,
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26769">26769 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26770">26770 </span>List directories (sync folders) in top level of your SugarSync
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26771">26771 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26772">26772 </span>    rclone lsd remote:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26773">26773 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26774">26774 </span>List all the files in your SugarSync folder &quot;Test&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26775">26775 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26776">26776 </span>    rclone ls remote:Test
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26777">26777 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26778">26778 </span>To copy a local directory to an SugarSync folder called backup
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26779">26779 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26780">26780 </span>    rclone copy /home/source remote:backup
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26781">26781 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26782">26782 </span>Paths are specified as remote:path
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26783">26783 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26784">26784 </span>Paths may be as deep as required, e.g. remote:directory/subdirectory.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26785">26785 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26786">26786 </span>NB you can&#39;t create files in the top level folder you have to create a
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26787">26787 </span>folder, which rclone will create as a &quot;Sync Folder&quot; with SugarSync.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26788">26788 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26789">26789 </span>Modified time and hashes
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26790">26790 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26791">26791 </span>SugarSync does not support modification times or hashes, therefore
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26792">26792 </span>syncing will default to --size-only checking. Note that using --update
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26793">26793 </span>will work as rclone can read the time files were uploaded.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26794">26794 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26795">26795 </span>Restricted filename characters
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26796">26796 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26797">26797 </span>SugarSync replaces the default restricted characters set except for DEL.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26798">26798 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26799">26799 </span>Invalid UTF-8 bytes will also be replaced, as they can&#39;t be used in XML
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26800">26800 </span>strings.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26801">26801 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26802">26802 </span>Deleting files
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26803">26803 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26804">26804 </span>Deleted files will be moved to the &quot;Deleted items&quot; folder by default.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26805">26805 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26806">26806 </span>However you can supply the flag --sugarsync-hard-delete or set the
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26807">26807 </span>config parameter hard_delete = true if you would like files to be
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26808">26808 </span>deleted straight away.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26809">26809 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26810">26810 </span>Standard Options
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26811">26811 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26812">26812 </span>Here are the standard options specific to sugarsync (Sugarsync).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26813">26813 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26814">26814 </span>--sugarsync-app-id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26815">26815 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26816">26816 </span>Sugarsync App ID.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26817">26817 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26818">26818 </span>Leave blank to use rclone&#39;s.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26819">26819 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26820">26820 </span>-   Config: app_id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26821">26821 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_APP_ID
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26822">26822 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26823">26823 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26824">26824 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26825">26825 </span>--sugarsync-access-key-id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26826">26826 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26827">26827 </span>Sugarsync Access Key ID.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26828">26828 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26829">26829 </span>Leave blank to use rclone&#39;s.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26830">26830 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26831">26831 </span>-   Config: access_key_id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26832">26832 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_ACCESS_KEY_ID
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26833">26833 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26834">26834 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26835">26835 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26836">26836 </span>--sugarsync-private-access-key
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26837">26837 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26838">26838 </span>Sugarsync Private Access Key
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26839">26839 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26840">26840 </span>Leave blank to use rclone&#39;s.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26841">26841 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26842">26842 </span>-   Config: private_access_key
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26843">26843 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_PRIVATE_ACCESS_KEY
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26844">26844 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26845">26845 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26846">26846 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26847">26847 </span>--sugarsync-hard-delete
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26848">26848 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26849">26849 </span>Permanently delete files if true otherwise put them in the deleted
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26850">26850 </span>files.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26851">26851 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26852">26852 </span>-   Config: hard_delete
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26853">26853 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_HARD_DELETE
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26854">26854 </span>-   Type: bool
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26855">26855 </span>-   Default: false
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26856">26856 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26857">26857 </span>Advanced Options
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26858">26858 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26859">26859 </span>Here are the advanced options specific to sugarsync (Sugarsync).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26860">26860 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26861">26861 </span>--sugarsync-refresh-token
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26862">26862 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26863">26863 </span>Sugarsync refresh token
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26864">26864 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26865">26865 </span>Leave blank normally, will be auto configured by rclone.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26866">26866 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26867">26867 </span>-   Config: refresh_token
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26868">26868 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_REFRESH_TOKEN
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26869">26869 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26870">26870 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26871">26871 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26872">26872 </span>--sugarsync-authorization
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26873">26873 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26874">26874 </span>Sugarsync authorization
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26875">26875 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26876">26876 </span>Leave blank normally, will be auto configured by rclone.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26877">26877 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26878">26878 </span>-   Config: authorization
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26879">26879 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_AUTHORIZATION
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26880">26880 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26881">26881 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26882">26882 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26883">26883 </span>--sugarsync-authorization-expiry
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26884">26884 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26885">26885 </span>Sugarsync authorization expiry
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26886">26886 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26887">26887 </span>Leave blank normally, will be auto configured by rclone.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26888">26888 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26889">26889 </span>-   Config: authorization_expiry
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26890">26890 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_AUTHORIZATION_EXPIRY
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26891">26891 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26892">26892 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26893">26893 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26894">26894 </span>--sugarsync-user
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26895">26895 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26896">26896 </span>Sugarsync user
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26897">26897 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26898">26898 </span>Leave blank normally, will be auto configured by rclone.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26899">26899 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26900">26900 </span>-   Config: user
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26901">26901 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_USER
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26902">26902 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26903">26903 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26904">26904 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26905">26905 </span>--sugarsync-root-id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26906">26906 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26907">26907 </span>Sugarsync root id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26908">26908 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26909">26909 </span>Leave blank normally, will be auto configured by rclone.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26910">26910 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26911">26911 </span>-   Config: root_id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26912">26912 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_ROOT_ID
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26913">26913 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26914">26914 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26915">26915 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26916">26916 </span>--sugarsync-deleted-id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26917">26917 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26918">26918 </span>Sugarsync deleted folder id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26919">26919 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26920">26920 </span>Leave blank normally, will be auto configured by rclone.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26921">26921 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26922">26922 </span>-   Config: deleted_id
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26923">26923 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_DELETED_ID
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26924">26924 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26925">26925 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26926">26926 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26927">26927 </span>--sugarsync-encoding
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26928">26928 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26929">26929 </span>This sets the encoding for the backend.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26930">26930 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26931">26931 </span>See: the encoding section in the overview for more info.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26932">26932 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26933">26933 </span>-   Config: encoding
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26934">26934 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_SUGARSYNC_ENCODING
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26935">26935 </span>-   Type: MultiEncoder
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26936">26936 </span>-   Default: Slash,Ctl,InvalidUtf8,Dot
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26937">26937 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26938">26938 </span>Limitations
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26939">26939 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26940">26940 </span>rclone about is not supported by the SugarSync backend. Backends without
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26941">26941 </span>this capability cannot determine free space for an rclone mount or use
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26942">26942 </span>policy mfs (most free space) as a member of an rclone union remote.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26943">26943 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26944">26944 </span>See List of backends that do not support rclone about See rclone about
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26945">26945 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26946">26946 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26947">26947 </span>Tardigrade
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26948">26948 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26949">26949 </span>Tardigrade is an encrypted, secure, and cost-effective object storage
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26950">26950 </span>service that enables you to store, back up, and archive large amounts of
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26951">26951 </span>data in a decentralized manner.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26952">26952 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26953">26953 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26954">26954 </span>Setup
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26955">26955 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26956">26956 </span>To make a new Tardigrade configuration you need one of the following: *
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26957">26957 </span>Access Grant that someone else shared with you. * API Key of a
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26958">26958 </span>Tardigrade project you are a member of.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26959">26959 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26960">26960 </span>Here is an example of how to make a remote called remote. First run:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26961">26961 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26962">26962 </span>     rclone config
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26963">26963 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26964">26964 </span>This will guide you through an interactive setup process:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26965">26965 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26966">26966 </span>Setup with access grant
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26967">26967 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26968">26968 </span>    No remotes found - make a new one
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26969">26969 </span>    n) New remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26970">26970 </span>    s) Set configuration password
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26971">26971 </span>    q) Quit config
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26972">26972 </span>    n/s/q&gt; n
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26973">26973 </span>    name&gt; remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26974">26974 </span>    Type of storage to configure.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26975">26975 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26976">26976 </span>    Choose a number from below, or type in your own value
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26977">26977 </span>    [snip]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26978">26978 </span>    XX / Tardigrade Decentralized Cloud Storage
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26979">26979 </span>       \ &quot;tardigrade&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26980">26980 </span>    [snip]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26981">26981 </span>    Storage&gt; tardigrade
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26982">26982 </span>    ** See help for tardigrade backend at: https://rclone.org/tardigrade/ **
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26983">26983 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26984">26984 </span>    Choose an authentication method.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26985">26985 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;existing&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26986">26986 </span>    Choose a number from below, or type in your own value
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26987">26987 </span>     1 / Use an existing access grant.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26988">26988 </span>       \ &quot;existing&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26989">26989 </span>     2 / Create a new access grant from satellite address, API key, and passphrase.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26990">26990 </span>       \ &quot;new&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26991">26991 </span>    provider&gt; existing
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26992">26992 </span>    Access Grant.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26993">26993 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26994">26994 </span>    access_grant&gt; your-access-grant-received-by-someone-else
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26995">26995 </span>    Remote config
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26996">26996 </span>    --------------------
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26997">26997 </span>    [remote]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26998">26998 </span>    type = tardigrade
<span class="hl lin" id="l_26999">26999 </span>    access_grant = your-access-grant-received-by-someone-else
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27000">27000 </span>    --------------------
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27001">27001 </span>    y) Yes this is OK (default)
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27002">27002 </span>    e) Edit this remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27003">27003 </span>    d) Delete this remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27004">27004 </span>    y/e/d&gt; y
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27005">27005 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27006">27006 </span>Setup with API key and passphrase
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27007">27007 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27008">27008 </span>    No remotes found - make a new one
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27009">27009 </span>    n) New remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27010">27010 </span>    s) Set configuration password
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27011">27011 </span>    q) Quit config
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27012">27012 </span>    n/s/q&gt; n
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27013">27013 </span>    name&gt; remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27014">27014 </span>    Type of storage to configure.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27015">27015 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27016">27016 </span>    Choose a number from below, or type in your own value
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27017">27017 </span>    [snip]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27018">27018 </span>    XX / Tardigrade Decentralized Cloud Storage
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27019">27019 </span>       \ &quot;tardigrade&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27020">27020 </span>    [snip]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27021">27021 </span>    Storage&gt; tardigrade
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27022">27022 </span>    ** See help for tardigrade backend at: https://rclone.org/tardigrade/ **
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27023">27023 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27024">27024 </span>    Choose an authentication method.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27025">27025 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;existing&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27026">27026 </span>    Choose a number from below, or type in your own value
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27027">27027 </span>     1 / Use an existing access grant.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27028">27028 </span>       \ &quot;existing&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27029">27029 </span>     2 / Create a new access grant from satellite address, API key, and passphrase.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27030">27030 </span>       \ &quot;new&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27031">27031 </span>    provider&gt; new
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27032">27032 </span>    Satellite Address. Custom satellite address should match the format: `&lt;nodeid&gt;&#64;&lt;address&gt;:&lt;port&gt;`.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27033">27033 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;us-central-1.tardigrade.io&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27034">27034 </span>    Choose a number from below, or type in your own value
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27035">27035 </span>     1 / US Central 1
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27036">27036 </span>       \ &quot;us-central-1.tardigrade.io&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27037">27037 </span>     2 / Europe West 1
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27038">27038 </span>       \ &quot;europe-west-1.tardigrade.io&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27039">27039 </span>     3 / Asia East 1
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27040">27040 </span>       \ &quot;asia-east-1.tardigrade.io&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27041">27041 </span>    satellite_address&gt; 1
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27042">27042 </span>    API Key.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27043">27043 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27044">27044 </span>    api_key&gt; your-api-key-for-your-tardigrade-project
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27045">27045 </span>    Encryption Passphrase. To access existing objects enter passphrase used for uploading.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27046">27046 </span>    Enter a string value. Press Enter for the default (&quot;&quot;).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27047">27047 </span>    passphrase&gt; your-human-readable-encryption-passphrase
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27048">27048 </span>    Remote config
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27049">27049 </span>    --------------------
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27050">27050 </span>    [remote]
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27051">27051 </span>    type = tardigrade
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27052">27052 </span>    satellite_address = 12EayRS2V1kEsWESU9QMRseFhdxYxKicsiFmxrsLZHeLUtdps3S&#64;us-central-1.tardigrade.io:7777
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27053">27053 </span>    api_key = your-api-key-for-your-tardigrade-project
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27054">27054 </span>    passphrase = your-human-readable-encryption-passphrase
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27055">27055 </span>    access_grant = the-access-grant-generated-from-the-api-key-and-passphrase
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27056">27056 </span>    --------------------
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27057">27057 </span>    y) Yes this is OK (default)
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27058">27058 </span>    e) Edit this remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27059">27059 </span>    d) Delete this remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27060">27060 </span>    y/e/d&gt; y
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27061">27061 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27062">27062 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27063">27063 </span>Usage
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27064">27064 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27065">27065 </span>Paths are specified as remote:bucket (or remote: for the lsf command.)
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27066">27066 </span>You may put subdirectories in too, e.g. remote:bucket/path/to/dir.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27067">27067 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27068">27068 </span>Once configured you can then use rclone like this.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27069">27069 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27070">27070 </span>Create a new bucket
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27071">27071 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27072">27072 </span>Use the mkdir command to create new bucket, e.g. bucket.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27073">27073 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27074">27074 </span>    rclone mkdir remote:bucket
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27075">27075 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27076">27076 </span>List all buckets
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27077">27077 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27078">27078 </span>Use the lsf command to list all buckets.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27079">27079 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27080">27080 </span>    rclone lsf remote:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27081">27081 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27082">27082 </span>Note the colon (:) character at the end of the command line.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27083">27083 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27084">27084 </span>Delete a bucket
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27085">27085 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27086">27086 </span>Use the rmdir command to delete an empty bucket.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27087">27087 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27088">27088 </span>    rclone rmdir remote:bucket
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27089">27089 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27090">27090 </span>Use the purge command to delete a non-empty bucket with all its content.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27091">27091 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27092">27092 </span>    rclone purge remote:bucket
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27093">27093 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27094">27094 </span>Upload objects
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27095">27095 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27096">27096 </span>Use the copy command to upload an object.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27097">27097 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27098">27098 </span>    rclone copy --progress /home/local/directory/file.ext remote:bucket/path/to/dir/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27099">27099 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27100">27100 </span>The --progress flag is for displaying progress information. Remove it if
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27101">27101 </span>you don&#39;t need this information.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27102">27102 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27103">27103 </span>Use a folder in the local path to upload all its objects.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27104">27104 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27105">27105 </span>    rclone copy --progress /home/local/directory/ remote:bucket/path/to/dir/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27106">27106 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27107">27107 </span>Only modified files will be copied.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27108">27108 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27109">27109 </span>List objects
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27110">27110 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27111">27111 </span>Use the ls command to list recursively all objects in a bucket.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27112">27112 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27113">27113 </span>    rclone ls remote:bucket
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27114">27114 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27115">27115 </span>Add the folder to the remote path to list recursively all objects in
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27116">27116 </span>this folder.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27117">27117 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27118">27118 </span>    rclone ls remote:bucket/path/to/dir/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27119">27119 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27120">27120 </span>Use the lsf command to list non-recursively all objects in a bucket or a
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27121">27121 </span>folder.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27122">27122 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27123">27123 </span>    rclone lsf remote:bucket/path/to/dir/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27124">27124 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27125">27125 </span>Download objects
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27126">27126 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27127">27127 </span>Use the copy command to download an object.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27128">27128 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27129">27129 </span>    rclone copy --progress remote:bucket/path/to/dir/file.ext /home/local/directory/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27130">27130 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27131">27131 </span>The --progress flag is for displaying progress information. Remove it if
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27132">27132 </span>you don&#39;t need this information.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27133">27133 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27134">27134 </span>Use a folder in the remote path to download all its objects.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27135">27135 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27136">27136 </span>    rclone copy --progress remote:bucket/path/to/dir/ /home/local/directory/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27137">27137 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27138">27138 </span>Delete objects
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27139">27139 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27140">27140 </span>Use the deletefile command to delete a single object.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27141">27141 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27142">27142 </span>    rclone deletefile remote:bucket/path/to/dir/file.ext
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27143">27143 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27144">27144 </span>Use the delete command to delete all object in a folder.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27145">27145 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27146">27146 </span>    rclone delete remote:bucket/path/to/dir/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27147">27147 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27148">27148 </span>Print the total size of objects
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27149">27149 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27150">27150 </span>Use the size command to print the total size of objects in a bucket or a
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27151">27151 </span>folder.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27152">27152 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27153">27153 </span>    rclone size remote:bucket/path/to/dir/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27154">27154 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27155">27155 </span>Sync two Locations
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27156">27156 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27157">27157 </span>Use the sync command to sync the source to the destination, changing the
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27158">27158 </span>destination only, deleting any excess files.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27159">27159 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27160">27160 </span>    rclone sync -i --progress /home/local/directory/ remote:bucket/path/to/dir/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27161">27161 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27162">27162 </span>The --progress flag is for displaying progress information. Remove it if
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27163">27163 </span>you don&#39;t need this information.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27164">27164 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27165">27165 </span>Since this can cause data loss, test first with the --dry-run flag to
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27166">27166 </span>see exactly what would be copied and deleted.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27167">27167 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27168">27168 </span>The sync can be done also from Tardigrade to the local file system.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27169">27169 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27170">27170 </span>    rclone sync -i --progress remote:bucket/path/to/dir/ /home/local/directory/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27171">27171 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27172">27172 </span>Or between two Tardigrade buckets.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27173">27173 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27174">27174 </span>    rclone sync -i --progress remote-us:bucket/path/to/dir/ remote-europe:bucket/path/to/dir/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27175">27175 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27176">27176 </span>Or even between another cloud storage and Tardigrade.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27177">27177 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27178">27178 </span>    rclone sync -i --progress s3:bucket/path/to/dir/ tardigrade:bucket/path/to/dir/
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27179">27179 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27180">27180 </span>Standard Options
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27181">27181 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27182">27182 </span>Here are the standard options specific to tardigrade (Tardigrade
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27183">27183 </span>Decentralized Cloud Storage).
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27184">27184 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27185">27185 </span>--tardigrade-provider
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27186">27186 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27187">27187 </span>Choose an authentication method.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27188">27188 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27189">27189 </span>-   Config: provider
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27190">27190 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_TARDIGRADE_PROVIDER
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27191">27191 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27192">27192 </span>-   Default: &quot;existing&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27193">27193 </span>-   Examples:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27194">27194 </span>    -   &quot;existing&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27195">27195 </span>        -   Use an existing access grant.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27196">27196 </span>    -   &quot;new&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27197">27197 </span>        -   Create a new access grant from satellite address, API key,
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27198">27198 </span>            and passphrase.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27199">27199 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27200">27200 </span>--tardigrade-access-grant
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27201">27201 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27202">27202 </span>Access Grant.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27203">27203 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27204">27204 </span>-   Config: access_grant
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27205">27205 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_TARDIGRADE_ACCESS_GRANT
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27206">27206 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27207">27207 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27208">27208 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27209">27209 </span>--tardigrade-satellite-address
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27210">27210 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27211">27211 </span>Satellite Address. Custom satellite address should match the format:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27212">27212 </span>&lt;nodeid&gt;&#64;&lt;address&gt;:&lt;port&gt;.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27213">27213 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27214">27214 </span>-   Config: satellite_address
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27215">27215 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_TARDIGRADE_SATELLITE_ADDRESS
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27216">27216 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27217">27217 </span>-   Default: &quot;us-central-1.tardigrade.io&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27218">27218 </span>-   Examples:
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27219">27219 </span>    -   &quot;us-central-1.tardigrade.io&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27220">27220 </span>        -   US Central 1
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27221">27221 </span>    -   &quot;europe-west-1.tardigrade.io&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27222">27222 </span>        -   Europe West 1
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27223">27223 </span>    -   &quot;asia-east-1.tardigrade.io&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27224">27224 </span>        -   Asia East 1
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27225">27225 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27226">27226 </span>--tardigrade-api-key
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27227">27227 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27228">27228 </span>API Key.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27229">27229 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27230">27230 </span>-   Config: api_key
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27231">27231 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_TARDIGRADE_API_KEY
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27232">27232 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27233">27233 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27234">27234 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27235">27235 </span>--tardigrade-passphrase
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27236">27236 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27237">27237 </span>Encryption Passphrase. To access existing objects enter passphrase used
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27238">27238 </span>for uploading.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27239">27239 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27240">27240 </span>-   Config: passphrase
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27241">27241 </span>-   Env Var: RCLONE_TARDIGRADE_PASSPHRASE
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27242">27242 </span>-   Type: string
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27243">27243 </span>-   Default: &quot;&quot;
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27244">27244 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27245">27245 </span>Limitations
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27246">27246 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27247">27247 </span>rclone about is not supported by the rclone Tardigrade backend. Backends
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27248">27248 </span>without this capability cannot determine free space for an rclone mount
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27249">27249 </span>or use policy mfs (most free space) as a member of an rclone union
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27250">27250 </span>remote.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27251">27251 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27252">27252 </span>See List of backends that do not support rclone about See rclone about
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27253">27253 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27254">27254 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27255">27255 </span>Union
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27256">27256 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27257">27257 </span>The union remote provides a unification similar to UnionFS using other
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27258">27258 </span>remotes.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27259">27259 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27260">27260 </span>Paths may be as deep as required or a local path, e.g.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27261">27261 </span>remote:directory/subdirectory or /directory/subdirectory.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27262">27262 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27263">27263 </span>During the initial setup with rclone config you will specify the
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27264">27264 </span>upstream remotes as a space separated list. The upstream remotes can
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27265">27265 </span>either be a local paths or other remotes.
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27266">27266 </span>
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27267">27267 </span>Attribute :ro and :nc can be attach to the end of path to tag the remote
<span class="hl lin" id="l_27268">27268 </span>as READ ONLY or NO CREATE, e.g. remote:directory/subdirectory:ro or
